description: Combine all changes from another branch into a single staged change you then commit yourself
intents: merge a branch but keep all changes as one commit
i dont want all those small commits in main
squash a feature branch into one commit
merge cleanly without preserving commit history
fold a branches commits into one staged change before committing
i want one clean commit on main from a messy feature branch
merge a branch and squash everything into a single commit
